title: Fix Result
description: Result of a fix attempt. Reports whether all issues were addressed, some remain, or none were found.

status.description: Outcome of the fix attempt. Values: 'all_issues_addressed' (every issue was resolved), 'issues_remain' (some issues could not be fixed), 'no_issues_found' (there were no issues to fix).

summary.description: Optional summary of what was done during the fix attempt. May contain markdown for formatting. Omit if not applicable.
